rows.CNzh:

但是想漂亮地装饰好，还缺了些东西。

还有<Color=red>2个<Color=white>能发出强光的<Color=red>光亮花的种子<Color=white>……
<unk[3:0:263]>光亮花的种子能在杂货屋买到，
但是我想要的是<Color=red>更大的<Color=white>那种！
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>只要再有这些，
我的秘密基地就能完成了……

<unk[3:0:263]>光亮花的種子呢，

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>要是有了這些東西，
我就能完成我的秘密小房間了……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]>Well, guess what!<unk[5:0]> We're in the Great
Deku Tree's mouth. Guess what else! <unk[5:0]>I'm
putting together a SECRET room here!
<unk[3:0:268]>Right now I'm fixing up the decor. But I
need more pretty things...

I need <Color=red>four<Color=white> <Color=red>blue nightshades<Color=white> that glow
gently at night, and <Color=red>two<Color=white> really vivid
<Color=red>brightbloom seeds<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:263]>For the brightbloom seeds, I'm looking for
something <Color=red>bigger <Color=white>than what you can find
in the General Shoppe.
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>That's all I need to finish my
super-secret room...

rows.CNzh:
